document.docAuthor: Barboza, Gloria E., Garcia, Carolina Carrizo, Bianchetti, Luciano de Bem, Romero, Maria V. & Scaldaferro, Marisel
document.masterDocTitle: Monograph of wild and cultivated chili peppers (Capsicum L., Solanaceae)

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Monograph of wild and cultivated chili peppers (Capsicum L., Solanaceae)

subSubSection.paragraph: Capsicum section Decameris Bitter, Abh. Naturwiss. Vereins Bremen 24(2): 293. 1919. Type: C. dusenii Bitter
Capsicum section Capsicum , Huitieme Congr. Int. Bot. Paris. Comptes Rend. Seances Rapp. & Commun. 1954, sect.4: 73. 1956. Type: C. annuum L.

C. annuum
L. ( lectotype , designated by Britton 1918 , pg. 338).

(Fig. 19 ).
Species of
Capsicum
are native to temperate, subtropical and tropical regions in the Americas, growing from southern United States of America to central Argentina and Brazil. Five taxa are widely cultivated elsewhere.
